name: MDC Partners Inc.
description: MDC Partners Inc. was a prominent advertising and marketing holding company based in New York City, known for its unique partnership model that acquired majority stakes in various creative agencies while allowing founders to retain ownership. The company provided a wide range of marketing, strategic consulting, and communications services to high-profile global clients. In 2021, MDC Partners completed a significant merger with Stagwell Media, resulting in the formation of a new entity, Stagwell Inc., which now operates as a challenger holding company focused on transforming the marketing industry.
